summary: AI Video Prompt: Vintage screen effect (HTML-in-canvas)
summaryZh: AI 视频提示词：Vintage screen effect (HTML-in-canvas)

artifact.usageMarkdown: 这是一个 AI 视频 Prompt 资产。你可以直接复制 **Agent 提示词** 选项卡中的内容，在本地使用支持 Remotion 技能的 AI 编码助手（如 Claude Code、Cursor 或 Codex）来一键生成视频源码。
artifact.agentPrompt:
https://www.remotion.dev/docs/remotion/html-in-canvas                                             

make a new composition and implement a subtle CRT convex shape shader on top of a HTML element.   
content: terminal and remotion themed. the command and output of "npx create-video@latest --yes --blank my-video"                                                                                 

should be animated.                                                                               

then "claude" should be invoked and the prompt "Add a CRT effect using HTML-in-canvas " should be shown
